summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Quasar Apps website contact form submission and testimonials carousel navigation. Both frontend and backend functionality verified successfully.

integration_issues.issue: Toast notification not displaying after successful form submission
integration_issues.note: Form submission works correctly and clears after success, but success toast message not visible to user

passed_tests: Contact form field filling (name, email, company, message)
Backend API contact form submission (200 status)
Backend API error handling (404 for invalid requests)
All 8/8 backend API endpoints working correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Consider investigating why success toast notifications are not displaying after contact form submission. The form functionality works correctly but user feedback could be improved.
